allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps supply-and-demand see how customers, suppliers, and competitors interact instead of treating price in isolation.
Risk-assessment helps supply-and-demand translate market pressure changes into decision-relevant exposure rather than vague intuition.
allies.source_quote: objective starting point for making decisions

structured_tensions.tension_text: Supply-and-demand conflicts with status-quo-bias when pricing and capacity remain fixed despite shifted market equilibrium.
Supply-and-demand conflicts with anchoring when an initial price expectation distorts objective assessment of market conditions.
